headerDisplay: Backs up your Homebridge configuration to any Git remote (GitHub, Forgejo, Gitea, GitLab, self-hosted) on every change and on a schedule. Choose HTTPS (token) or SSH (deployment key) authentication.
footerDisplay: HTTPS uses [isomorphic-git](https://isomorphic-git.org) — no `git` binary required. SSH uses a deployment key via the host's `git` + `ssh` (not available in the official Homebridge Docker image).

repository_url.title: Repository URL
repository_url.description: HTTPS clone URL (https://host/you/repo.git) for token auth, or SSH URL (git@host:you/repo.git) for deployment-key auth.

branch.title: Branch
branch.description: Branch to push backups to. The plugin fast-forwards from this branch before each commit.

auth_method.title: Authentication Method
auth_method.description: HTTPS needs no git binary (works in Docker). SSH requires git + ssh on the host.

git_username.title: Git Username
git_username.description: Most token-based providers accept any value (e.g. 'git' for GitHub PATs; the token-owner username for Forgejo/Gitea).

git_token.title: Git Token / Password
git_token.description: Required for HTTPS auth. Personal Access Token or password with write access to the target repository.

ssh_key_path.title: SSH Private Key Path
ssh_key_path.description: Preferred for SSH: path to an existing private key file on the host. Keeps the key OUT of the backed-up config. If set, it takes precedence over the inline key below.

ssh_private_key.title: SSH Private Key (inline)
ssh_private_key.description: Alternative to a key path: paste the full private key (OpenSSH/PEM, including the BEGIN/END lines). NOTE: this value lives in config.json and will therefore appear in the backed-up config — prefer a key path, or a dedicated backup-only deploy key.

file_path.title: File path in repository
file_path.description: Path within the repository where the Homebridge config.json should be written. Subdirectories are created automatically.

backup_interval.title: Backup interval (minutes)
backup_interval.description: Scheduled backup cadence. The plugin also commits immediately when the Homebridge config changes on disk.
